titles.title: Healthy Start Reauthorization Act of 2026
Healthy Start Reauthorization Act of 2026
Healthy Start Reauthorization Act of 2026
A bill to amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize the Healthy Start Initiative.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions. Ordered to be reported with an amendment favorably.
Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions. Reported by Senator Cassidy with an amendment. Without written report.

calendar.text: Placed on Senate Legislative Calendar under General Orders. Calendar No. 442.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
